  "clarification_needed": false,
  "clarification_question": "",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "Verifying the logical consistency of the argument chain is load-bearing for ensuring the research statements in the artifact are solid.",
    "R1.3": "Checking alignment between claims and reported evidence is load-bearing to confirm the solidity of the evaluation and conclusions.",
    "R1.6": "Polishing sentence- and paragraph-level grammar, flow, and conciseness is a central responsibility to make the artifact's writing solid.",
    "RX.1": "Ensuring proper uncertainty disclosure is load-bearing for the solidity of limitations and open questions discussed in the artifact.",
    "RX.2": "Avoiding overclaims is load-bearing to maintain the solidity of comparative statements and beliefs expressed in the text.",
    "RX.3": "Adhering to the stated scope, including exclusions, is load-bearing for the overall solidity of the analysis presented.",
    "RX.4": "Avoiding potential downstream harms is central given the artifact's focus on V2G systems related to power grid infrastructure.",
    "RX.5": "Maintaining provenance and traceability of strategies and results is central to ensuring the artifact's claims are solidly grounded."
  }
}

rationale.R1.2: Verifying the logical consistency of the argument chain is load-bearing for ensuring the research statements in the artifact are solid.
rationale.R1.3: Checking alignment between claims and reported evidence is load-bearing to confirm the solidity of the evaluation and conclusions.
rationale.R1.6: Polishing sentence- and paragraph-level grammar, flow, and conciseness is a central responsibility to make the artifact's writing solid.
rationale.RX.1: Ensuring proper uncertainty disclosure is load-bearing for the solidity of limitations and open questions discussed in the artifact.
rationale.RX.2: Avoiding overclaims is load-bearing to maintain the solidity of comparative statements and beliefs expressed in the text.
rationale.RX.3: Adhering to the stated scope, including exclusions, is load-bearing for the overall solidity of the analysis presented.
rationale.RX.4: Avoiding potential downstream harms is central given the artifact's focus on V2G systems related to power grid infrastructure.
rationale.RX.5: Maintaining provenance and traceability of strategies and results is central to ensuring the artifact's claims are solidly grounded.
